body: {"ac_map":[{"parent_ac":"1. TestCmdTestsDoNotSpawnRealProviderCLIs wraps representative cmd tests and proves no descendant process named real codex, claude, or gemini remains after the test.","coverage":"Child 'tests: assert cmd suite leaves no real provider CLI descendants' AC1 (TestCmdTestsDoNotSpawnRealProviderCLIs) and AC2 (descendant-only scoping)."},{"parent_ac":"2. TestZeroConfigWork_NoConfigDoesNotEmitUnderSpecified passes with PATH containing fake harness binaries and without reading the user's real Fizeau discovery cache.","coverage":"Child 'tests: make zero-config and underspecified-routing work tests use fake harness routes' AC1; supported by the hermetic guard child AC2 (fake CLIs on PATH) and AC1 (cache redirect)."},{"parent_ac":"3. TestWorkDoesNotSpawnProviderAfterUnderSpecifiedRouting passes without launching a real provider CLI.","coverage":"Child 'tests: make zero-config and underspecified-routing work tests use fake harness routes' AC2."},{"parent_ac":"4. `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./cmd/... -run 'TestZeroConfigWork_NoConfigDoesNotEmitUnderSpecified|TestWorkDoesNotSpawnProviderAfterUnderSpecifiedRouting|TestCmdTestsDoNotSpawnRealProviderCLIs'` passes.","coverage":"Split: zero-config/underspecified-routing child AC3 covers the first two run-filter names; leak-assertion child AC3 covers TestCmdTestsDoNotSpawnRealProviderCLIs."},{"parent_ac":"5. `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./cmd/...` no longer spawns real codex/claude/gemini processes or loops on `/home/*/.cache/fizeau/discovery/*.refreshing`.","coverage":"Child 'tests: add hermetic provider-discovery guard for the cmd suite' AC3 (no discovery-cache loop) and AC5; leak-assertion child AC4 (no surviving provider descendants)."},{"parent_ac":"6. lefthook run pre-commit passes without leaving provider descendants.","coverage":"All three children carry a lefthook gate (hermetic-guard AC6, zero-config child AC5); leak-assertion child AC5 specifically asserts lefthook passes without leaving provider descendants."}],"child_ids":["ddx-5588db08","ddx-bd70c416","ddx-95d80f7e"],"rationale":"Split along the three independent mechanisms the parent bundled: (1) a shared hermetic discovery/PATH guard that redirects Fizeau cache to a temp root and forces fake provider CLIs — the foundation; (2) a descendant-process leak assertion (TestCmdTestsDoNotSpawnRealProviderCLIs) that depends on the guard; (3) rewriting the two specific failing routing tests to use fake harness routes, also depending on the guard. Children 2 and 3 depend on child 1 (stated in their descriptions). All parent non-scope items (no weakening production discovery, no skipping tests, no killing unrelated interactive sessions) are repeated in every child, and every parent AC maps to a named child Test* symbol or a split across children."}

summary: closed as dead-intermediate bead (all children closed, execution-eligible=false)
